title: Undertake aerial rescue
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake aerial rescue demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for aerial rescue

pcs.text: Confirm emergency communication system is working
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm emergency communication system is working?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm emergency communication system is working.

pcs.text: Confirm emergency services contact numbers are documented
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm emergency services contact numbers are documented?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm emergency services contact numbers are documented.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and check first aid equipment and rescue kit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and check first aid equipment and rescue kit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and check first aid equipment and rescue kit.

pcs.text: Position rescue and first aid equipment for easy access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position rescue and first aid equipment for easy access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position rescue and first aid equipment for easy access.

pcs.text: Clarify own role in rescue situations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify own role in rescue situations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify own role in rescue situations.

pcs.text: Confirm first aid, rescue personnel and equipment with work team prior to undertaking rescue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm first aid, rescue personnel and equipment with work team prior to undertaking rescue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm first aid, rescue personnel and equipment with work team prior to undertaking rescue.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Communicate with work team during operations using agreed communication method for the site and activity being undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with work team during operations using agreed communication method for the site and activity being undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with work team during operations using agreed communication method for the site and activity being undertaken.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan for aerial rescue

elements.title: Assess and respond to an aerial emergency situation

pcs.text: Follow emergency response protocol according to workplace and industry procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow emergency response protocol according to workplace and industry procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow emergency response protocol according to workplace and industry procedures.

pcs.text: Stop all work activity and ensure other workers are aware of the incident
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stop all work activity and ensure other workers are aware of the incident?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stop all work activity and ensure other workers are aware of the incident.

pcs.text: Attempt communication with casualty
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attempt communication with casualty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attempt communication with casualty.

pcs.text: Activate emergency plan and request assistance from work team and public in accordance with rescue plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Activate emergency plan and request assistance from work team and public in accordance with rescue plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Activate emergency plan and request assistance from work team and public in accordance with rescue plan.

pcs.text: Obtain emergency assistance according to rescue plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain emergency assistance according to rescue plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain emergency assistance according to rescue plan.

pcs.text: Inspect site and tree for hazards associated with rescue, assess risks and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site and tree for hazards associated with rescue, assess risks and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site and tree for hazards associated with rescue, assess risks and implement controls.

pcs.text: Assess if rescue can be conducted safely within work team capability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess if rescue can be conducted safely within work team capability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess if rescue can be conducted safely within work team capability.

pcs.text: Seek assistance from emergency rescue services when safe rescue is not possible
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek assistance from emergency rescue services when safe rescue is not possible?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek assistance from emergency rescue services when safe rescue is not possible.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess and respond to an aerial emergency situation

elements.title: Access tree to undertake rescue

pcs.text: Select low-risk access methods to access tree and undertake rescue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select low-risk access methods to access tree and undertake rescue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select low-risk access methods to access tree and undertake rescue.

pcs.text: Maintain inspection of tree for above-ground hazards during ascent and throughout the rescue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain inspection of tree for above-ground hazards during ascent and throughout the rescue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain inspection of tree for above-ground hazards during ascent and throughout the rescue.

pcs.text: Maintain communication with casualty and ground crew
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain communication with casualty and ground crew?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain communication with casualty and ground crew.

pcs.text: Select and install suitable anchor points before reaching casualty
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and install suitable anchor points before reaching casualty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and install suitable anchor points before reaching casualty.

pcs.text: Install redirects to ensure good rope angle when reaching casualty
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install redirects to ensure good rope angle when reaching casualty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install redirects to ensure good rope angle when reaching casualty.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Access tree to undertake rescue

elements.title: Assess casualty condition and system integrity

pcs.text: Ensure rescuer is secure before approaching casualty
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure rescuer is secure before approaching casualty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure rescuer is secure before approaching casualty.

pcs.text: Assess the security of casualty attachment in tree and secure if deemed unstable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the security of casualty attachment in tree and secure if deemed unstable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the security of casualty attachment in tree and secure if deemed unstable.

pcs.text: Assess seriousness of condition of casualty according to first aid procedures and risk assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess seriousness of condition of casualty according to first aid procedures and risk assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess seriousness of condition of casualty according to first aid procedures and risk assessment.

pcs.text: Assess integrity of casualty climbing system to determine its suitability for lowering the casualty
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess integrity of casualty climbing system to determine its suitability for lowering the casualty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess integrity of casualty climbing system to determine its suitability for lowering the casualty.

pcs.text: Administer first aid above ground according to first aid procedures and risk assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer first aid above ground according to first aid procedures and risk assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer first aid above ground according to first aid procedures and risk assessment.

pcs.text: Apply first aid protocols for casualties with possible neck or spinal injuries and await expert medical attention
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply first aid protocols for casualties with possible neck or spinal injuries and await expert medical attention?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply first aid protocols for casualties with possible neck or spinal injuries and await expert medical attention.

pcs.text: Maintain communications with ground crew
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain communications with ground crew?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain communications with ground crew.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Assess casualty condition and system integrity

elements.title: Lower casualty to ground

pcs.text: Inform casualty of lowering procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform casualty of lowering procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform casualty of lowering procedure.

pcs.text: Prepare casualty for descent in accordance with first aid, rescue plan and risk assessments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare casualty for descent in accordance with first aid, rescue plan and risk assessments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare casualty for descent in accordance with first aid, rescue plan and risk assessments.

pcs.text: Select and implement rescue technique relative to rescue and emergency situation and casualty condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and implement rescue technique relative to rescue and emergency situation and casualty condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and implement rescue technique relative to rescue and emergency situation and casualty condition.

pcs.text: Descend tree safely in a controlled manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Descend tree safely in a controlled manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Descend tree safely in a controlled manner.

pcs.text: Lower casualty safely to ground with support of ground crew according to emergency conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Lower casualty safely to ground with support of ground crew according to emergency conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Lower casualty safely to ground with support of ground crew according to emergency conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Lower casualty to ground

elements.title: Complete rescue operations

pcs.text: Administer first aid on ground according to casualty condition until emergency services arrive
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer first aid on ground according to casualty condition until emergency services arrive?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer first aid on ground according to casualty condition until emergency services arrive.

pcs.text: Transfer responsibility of casualty to emergency services on their arrival
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transfer responsibility of casualty to emergency services on their arrival?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transfer responsibility of casualty to emergency services on their arrival.

pcs.text: Isolate equipment involved in incident for potential investigation and prevent reuse until checked
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate equipment involved in incident for potential investigation and prevent reuse until checked?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate equipment involved in incident for potential investigation and prevent reuse until checked.

pcs.text: Complete incident report and notify affected parties according to organisational procedures and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete incident report and notify affected parties according to organisational procedures and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete incident report and notify affected parties according to organisational procedures and regulatory requirements.
